rules: Students must maintain a minimum cumulative GPA of 2.0 to graduate
Students must complete all required program courses
Students must meet total credit requirements for the degree
Only courses with passing grades count toward graduation requirements
Residency requirements may apply (minimum credits completed at institution)
Minimum grade of C or better is required for prerequisite courses
Courses may be repeated to improve grade
The highest grade may be used in GPA calculation after repeat
Failing grades do not satisfy prerequisite requirements
